name: Forge Dedication Halls
summary: Ceremonial forge communities where craft, oath, and renewal are bound together under public House supervision.
motive: Keep forge labor sacred, socially legible, and politically loyal to the rebuilding order.
power_relations: Supported by Great Houses and Queen’s Court ritual authority
Influence worker morale more than formal law
visible_membership_base: Smiths, oath witnesses, apprentices, ritual overseers, memorial crafters.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Ceremonial importance can mask labor abuse when endurance is romanticized too heavily.
